source.notes: Sony GDM-FW900 — 24" / 22.5" viewable FD Trinitron. Aperture grille pitch VARIABLE: 0.23 mm at centre, 0.27 mm at edges (this is the canonical Sony spec; flat-pitch CRTs don't exist on this generation). Native 16:10 (1920×1200 / 2304×1440) — historical brochures list 16:9 because of the older 1920×1080 typical mode; the actual tube is 16:10. H 30-121 kHz, V 48-160 Hz, max 2304×1440@80 Hz. Profile aspect kept 16:9 for consistency with existing aspect_native enum but tube is 16:10.
Sony FD Trinitron primaries — close to SMPTE-C, with green slightly cyan-shifted (x=0.280 vs SMPTE-C x=0.310). Same per-channel decay as PVM/BVM Trinitrons.
